landing.title: Turn images into NFTs.
landing.subtitle: No upfront costs.
landing.description: Create and sell NFTs instantly with lazy minting. Your NFT is only minted when someone buys it—you never pay blockchain fees upfront.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Simple, fast, and cost-effective. No technical knowledge required.

step1.title: Upload
step1.description: Choose your image and add details

step2.title: List
step2.description: Set your price and list instantly

feature1.title: Eco-Friendly
feature1.description: Algorand is carbon-negative. Your NFTs don't harm the planet.

feature2.title: Lightning Fast
feature2.description: Transactions complete in seconds, not minutes or hours.

feature3.title: Secure & Reliable
feature3.description: Built on Algorand's secure blockchain technology.

lazyMinting.title: What is Lazy Minting?
lazyMinting.description: Traditional NFT creation requires you to pay blockchain fees upfront, even if your NFT never sells. With lazy minting, your NFT is prepared and listed instantly—but it only exists on the blockchain when someone buys it. The buyer pays the small minting fee (about $0.001), making it risk-free for creators.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your First NFT?
cta.description: Join thousands of creators selling NFTs with zero upfront costs.

create.title: Create Your NFT
create.description: Upload an image and prepare it for listing. Your NFT will be minted when someone buys it.
create.royaltyHint: Percentage you'll earn from future sales (0-100%)

lazyMintingInfo.title: About On-Chain Minting
lazyMintingInfo.description: Your NFT will be minted as an Algorand Standard Asset (ASA) immediately when you list it. You'll need to approve a small transaction fee (~{fee} {currency}) in your wallet.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Discover and collect unique NFTs created by artists around the world
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search NFTs by name or description...
marketplace.noResults: Try adjusting your search or filters
marketplace.beFirst: Be the first to create an NFT!

nftDetail.creator: Creator
nftDetail.yourNFT: This is your NFT. You cannot purchase it.
nftDetail.alreadySold: This NFT has already been sold.
nftDetail.howItWorks: How it works: When you click "Buy Now", this NFT will be minted on the Algorand blockchain and transferred to your wallet instantly. The minting fee (~{fee} {currency}) is included in the purchase.
nftDetail.purchaseInfo: You'll need to approve this transaction in your Pera Wallet. The NFT will be minted and transferred to your wallet upon confirmation.

purchaseSuccess.title: Purchase Successful!
purchaseSuccess.message: Your NFT has been minted and transferred to your wallet!
purchaseSuccess.viewDashboard: You can view it in your dashboard.

nftDetail.connectToBuy: You need to connect your Pera Wallet to purchase this NFT.

notFound.heading: NFT Not Found
notFound.description: The NFT you're looking for doesn't exist.

dashboard.noListingsDesc: Start creating NFTs to see them here

deleteConfirm.title: Delete NFT?
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this NFT? This action cannot be undone. The NFT will be permanently removed from your listings.

dashboard.noSalesDesc: NFTs you've created and sold will appear here
dashboard.relistDescription: Set a new price to re-list this NFT on the marketplace.
dashboard.pendingTransferTitle: Action required — transfer NFT to buyer
dashboard.pendingTransferDesc: You have sold NFTs that are still in your wallet. Sign the transfer to send them to the buyer.

wallet.connectDescription: You need to connect your wallet to list an NFT. We use Pera Wallet to securely manage your account on Algorand.
wallet.approveConnection: Click below to connect your Pera Wallet. You'll need to approve the connection in your wallet app.
